title: athyrium alpestre
intro: Athyrium alpestre, also known as the Alpine Lady fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Athyrium alpestre include reducing swelling and pain, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. Athyrium alpestre can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and vitality.
